ksa_text: Skill in evaluating AI bias and fairness, including designing and executing fairness metrics, detecting and measuring bias throughout the AI lifecycle, and conducting privacy risk assessment.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AG-S-003 (AG, Skill) maps to Health Informatics Specialist scope as weak fit. Composite score 0.5362 clears the weak fit threshold of 0.52. Top framework anchors: nist_ai_rmf=0.536, eu_ai_act=0.477, ddat=0.415. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within health informatics, clinical data analysis, and healthcare BI.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include upheld. Score 0.5362 for weak fit domain is consistent with ANL IC-level scope. Analytics-domain text signals confirmed. No internal contradictions identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA AG-S-003 (AG, composite 0.5362) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: KSA content aligns with NIST AI RMF; EU AI Act governance obligations; governance competencies are primarily above IC ANL scope. Analytics-domain terminology in KSA text confirms practical relevance to IC ANL work. Composite 0.5362 with signal across nist_ai_rmf=0.536, eu_ai_act=0.477, ddat=0.415 is consistent with documented ANL competency expectations at IC-to-senior-IC level. External ground truth supports inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include upheld. External evidence from AG-domain frameworks confirms KSA relevance to Health Informatics Specialist at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: include. P2 include confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.5362, domain AG, scope weak fit. High confidence.
